description: Regenerated ticket index for implementing the resumable transactional protocol redesign.

phases.title: Analysis and implementation mapping
phases.goal: Create a codebase map as an analysis pre-phase before changing runtime behavior so later tickets can identify exact modification targets without drifting from the plan.

tickets.title: Review all Python files under src and build an implementation map
Map persistence artifacts and their read/write code paths
Map begin, resume, and active-transaction selection code paths

phases.title: Define and align protocol contracts in code
phases.goal: Align the codebase with the minimal canonical continuation contract, identity model, and checkpoint model defined in the plan.

tickets.title: Define and enforce the identity boundary between ticket_id, tx_id, task_id, and session_id
Define the minimal canonical continuation contract in code
Separate status classification from next_action dispatch semantics
Align checkpoint events with the minimal canonical core event set

phases.title: Implement runtime identity and recovery simplifications
phases.goal: Implement exact active-transaction continuation, issued transaction identities, structural no-active handling, and bounded compatibility behavior.

tickets.title: Replace ticket-derived tx_id generation with issued transaction IDs
Unify active transaction selection around exact active_tx identity
Remove sentinel active-transaction semantics and adopt structural no-active state
Align materialized state with the minimal continuation contract
Make canonical next_action the sole continuation dispatcher
Normalize post-terminal handling into the canonical no-active baseline
Bound session context to a secondary runtime role
Implement bounded historical compatibility and malformed persistence failure behavior

phases.title: Harden with interruption-focused regression coverage and guidance
phases.goal: Prove that the redesigned protocol resumes correctly across interruption and that optional metadata is not required for correctness.

tickets.title: Add regression coverage for interrupted in-progress and checking flows
Add regression coverage for verify, commit, and post-commit interruption paths
Add regression coverage for terminal re-entry, no-change completion, and idempotent resume
Add regression coverage for historical compatibility and malformed persistence
Update operator and developer guidance for the redesigned protocol
Review all Python files under src and build an implementation map
